ours:
database:
  host: db.prod.internal
  port: 5432
  pool_size: 20
  timeout_seconds: 30

rate_limit:
  requests_per_minute: 600
  burst: 50

feature_flags:
  new_checkout_flow: true
theirs:
database:
  host: db.prod.internal
  port: 5432
  pool_size: 40
  timeout_seconds: 60

rate_limit:
  requests_per_minute: 600
  burst: 50

feature_flags:
  new_checkout_flow: true
  experimental_cache: true
base:
database:
  host: db.prod.internal
  port: 5432
  pool_size: 20
  timeout_seconds: 30

rate_limit:
  requests_per_minute: 600
  burst: 50

feature_flags:
  new_checkout_flow: true
description: OURS kept pool_size=20. THEIRS increased to pool_size=40 and timeout=60 (capacity increase) and added a new feature flag. Conflict is resolvable by preserving the newer values and the new flag.
